title: Blue Origin rocket explosion shows ‘fragility’ of national-security launch plans
description: Space Force efforts to breed more competitors aren’t keeping up with ever-increasing demand for rockets.

title: Korea’s LG already invests $10.6B in Vietnam, to build semiconductor substrate factory in Hai Phong
description: LG Innotek, the material arm of South Korean chaebol LG, will to expand its semiconductor substrate production into Vietnam by building a factory in the northern coastal city of Hai Phong.

title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
description: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory faces a real test, though.

title: Helion, the Sam Altman-backed fusion startup, raises $465M to build a power plant for Microsoft
description: Fusion startup Helion is racing to complete a power plant for Microsoft by 2028. A fresh infusion of cash should help with that.

title: A burglar used a Waymo to steal yoga clothes in San Francisco — and got away with it
description: The incident helps shed some new light on how Waymo treats and stores the footage captured by its robotaxis.

title: AstroForge completes DeepSpace-2 spacecraft
description:

title: Waymo’s spent robotaxi batteries will be used as grid storage

title: SpaceX’s xAI  just bought another $269M of Tesla Megapacks
description:
SpaceX’s amended S-1 IPO filing, published yesterday, reveals that xAI purchased another $269 million worth of Tesla Megapack products in April 2026 alone. That single month exceeds what xAI spent on Tesla Megapacks in all of 2024.

description:

title: Anthropic Funding Pushed Startup Investment To Near-Record Levels In May As Exit Market Reopened
description: All told, global venture funding reached $92 billion in May, marking the second-largest monthly total on record, just behind February, Crunchbase data shows. Of that, Anthropic raised $50 billion, or 54% of the month’s total funding.
